blurb.en: Across all three pools, AVAX-USD is showing the strongest entry signal right now. It has retraced 79.1% from its peak, with RSI at the 0th percentile — historically one of the better setups for a Smart DCA trigger. Formula score: 99.8/100.
blurb.zh: 本期三個池子中，AVAX-USD 的入場訊號最強。距高點回撤 79.1%，RSI 百分位 0%，歷史上這個位置的定投勝率相對較高。公式評分：99.8/100。

blurb.en: META has dipped 29.4% off its 52-week high — meaningful for a name of this size and stability. With RSI at just the 27th percentile, momentum is compressed. Smart DCA score: 73.2/100.
blurb.zh: META 距 52 週高點下滑 29.4%，對這類規模的藍籌股來說是相當顯著的回撤。RSI 僅在第 27 百分位，動能明顯收縮。智能定投評分：73.2/100。

blurb.en: COIN is down 63.2% from its high, placing RSI at the 17th historical percentile. Growth names can swing hard — this kind of reset is where our formula tends to find value. Entry score: 91.5/100.
blurb.zh: COIN 距高點下跌 63.2%，RSI 歷史百分位 17%。成長股波動大，這類深度修正正是公式設計尋找的入場點。入場評分：91.5/100。

blurb.en: BTC-USD has pulled back 49.7% with RSI at the 1th percentile — a combination that historically precedes recoveries in this asset class. Not your typical recommendation. Smart DCA score: 99.5/100.
blurb.zh: BTC-USD 回撤 49.7%，RSI 百分位 1%。這種組合在此類資產的歷史中常出現在反彈前夕。非典型推薦，公式評分：99.5/100。
